# xentral developer portal Documentation

> Documentation for xentral developer portal

## Guides
- [Create a customer (V2 API)](https://developer.xentral.com/docs/create-a-customer-v2-api.md)
- [Create a product (V2 API)](https://developer.xentral.com/docs/create-a-product-v2-api.md)
- [Create a sales order](https://developer.xentral.com/docs/create-sales-order-xentral-api-guide.md)
- [Fulfillment](https://developer.xentral.com/docs/fulfillment.md): From dispatched sales order to shipment
- [Read stock](https://developer.xentral.com/docs/read-stock.md)
- [Returns & Credit Notes](https://developer.xentral.com/docs/returns-credit-notes.md)
- [Update stock](https://developer.xentral.com/docs/update-stock.md)
- [Fiscal Integration (External Partner)](https://developer.xentral.com/docs/pos-fiscal-integration-external-partner.md)
- [Terminal Integration (Credit Debit Card Terminal)](https://developer.xentral.com/docs/pos-terminal-integration-guide-credit-debit-card-terminal.md)
- [3. Making your service production ready](https://developer.xentral.com/docs/3-making-your-service-production-ready.md): How an end user can setup a Carrier Integration as shipping method
- [2. Label creation requests](https://developer.xentral.com/docs/creating-a-label.md)
- [Example service](https://developer.xentral.com/docs/example-service.md): An example Carrier Integration Service in NextJS
- [FAQ](https://developer.xentral.com/docs/faq.md)
- [🚚 Carrier Integration](https://developer.xentral.com/docs/carrier-integration.md)
- [1. Registering the carrier service (setup)](https://developer.xentral.com/docs/setting-up-a-carrier.md)

## API Reference
- [Get available carriers](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/xentralcarrierintegrationservicecarriers.md): The request a Xentral instance makes to an external carrier service to get a list of available carriers and their products. This request will be made when a user wants to create a new shipping method.
- [Check the liveness of the service](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/xentralcarrierintegrationserviceliveness.md): The request a Xentral instance makes to an external carrier service to check the liveness of the service. This request will be made roughly every minute.
- [Cancel shipment](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/xentralcarrierintegrationserviceshipmentcancel.md): The request a Xentral instance makes to an external carrier service to cancel a shipment.
- [Create shipment](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/xentralcarrierintegrationserviceshipmentcreate.md): The request a Xentral instance makes to an external carrier service to generate a shipping label.
- [Get shipment](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/xentralcarrierintegrationserviceshipmentget.md): The request a Xentral instance makes to an external carrier service to get a shipment.
- [List delivery note deliveries](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/deliverynotedeliverieslist.md): Details of delivery note
- [Send invoice](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/invoicesend.md): Send invoice
- [Create parts v1](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/productcreateparts.md): Creates new parts for a product.
- [Update parts v1](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/productupdateparts.md): Updates the parts of a product.
- [List Credit Notes tags](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/creditnotetaglist.md): Returns a collection with all credit notes tags.
- [List delivery notes tags](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/deliverynotetaglist.md): Returns a collection with all delivery notes tags.
- [List Invoice tags](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/invoicetaglist.md): Returns a collection with all invoice tags.
- [Create product tag](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/producttagcreate.md): Creates a new product tag.
- [List product tags](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/producttaglist.md): Returns a collection with all products tags.
- [Update product tag](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/producttagupdate.md): Updates details of a single product tag
- [List suppliers tags](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/suppliertaglist.md): Returns a collection with all suppliers tags.
- [Create new product V1](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/productcreate.md): Creates a new product.<br><br> <h2>Warning: Multiple request body content types</h2> <p>     Due to technical limitations, the information provided here may not display all available request body content types.     We are currently working with our third-party documentation provider to address this issue.     For a complete and accurate representation of the available content types, we recommend referring to the <a target="_blank" href="https://github.com/xentral/api-spec-public">full OpenAPI specification</a>. </p> <p>     We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding as we work to resolve this matter. </p> <h3>Available request content types:</h3> <ul>     <li><b>application/json</b></li> <li>application/vnd.xentral.upsert+json</li> </ul>
- [Identify product](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/productidentifyproduct.md): Returns a collection with all products found with the identifier. Evaluates barcode, product number, manufacturer number, foreign number and packaging unit.
- [List products V1](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/productlist.md): Returns a collection with all products.
- [Update product v1](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/productupdate.md): Updates details of a single product
- [Update multiple products V1](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/productupdatemultiple.md): Updates multiple products
- [View product v1](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/productview.md): Returns details of a single product
- [Create purchase price V1](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/purchasepricecreate.md): Creates new purchase price
- [List purchase prices V1](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/purchasepricelist.md): Returns list of a purchase prices
- [Update purchase price V1](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/purchasepriceupdate.md): Updates details of a single purchase price
- [Update multiple purchase prices V1](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/purchasepriceupdatemultiple.md): Updates multiple purchase prices
- [List users](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/userlist.md): Returns a collection with all users.
- [List storage items V1](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/storage_itemlist.md): Returns all storage location items for the specified warehouse / location. If no Accept header is provided, or if Accept: application/json is specified, the response format is identical to version 2.
- [Webhooks](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/webhooks.md)
- [Authentication](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/authentication.md)
- [Testing the APIs](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/e.md)
- [Feedback?](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/feedback.md)
- [V1 and V2 Filtering, Ordering, & Pagination](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/filtering-sorting-pagination.md)
- [Introduction](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/intro.md): This page will help you get started with the Xentral  API.
- [PDF Documents](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/pdf-documents.md)
- [Rate Limiting](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/rate-limiting.md)
- [V3 Filtering, Ordering & Pagination](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/v3-filterung-ordering-pagination.md)
- [Media types & variants](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/variants.md)
- [Versioning](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/versioning.md)
- [Send email via email account V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-emailaccounts-id-actions-sendemail.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `mailAcct:sendEmail`.  Send an email using an existing email account. Attachments are base64-encoded with a max size of 10MB each (25MB total).
- [Delete sales price V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/deleteapi-v3-salesprices-id.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `salesPrice:delete`.  Delete a sales price.
- [🔒 View sales price V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/getapi-v3-salesprices-id.md): This endpoint is currently in Beta and available for testing. It may contain bugs, and breaking changes can occur at any time without prior notice. We do not recommend using Beta endpoints in production environments. Should you choose to use it in production, you assume full responsibility for any resulting issues.  This endpoint requires the following scopes: `salesPrice:read`.  View a sales price.
- [🔒 List sales prices V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/getapi-v3-salesprices.md): This endpoint is currently in Beta and available for testing. It may contain bugs, and breaking changes can occur at any time without prior notice. We do not recommend using Beta endpoints in production environments. Should you choose to use it in production, you assume full responsibility for any resulting issues.  This endpoint requires the following scopes: `salesPrice:read`.  Paginated list of SalesPrices.
- [🔒 Update multiple sales prices V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-salesprices.md): This endpoint is currently in Beta and available for testing. It may contain bugs, and breaking changes can occur at any time without prior notice. We do not recommend using Beta endpoints in production environments. Should you choose to use it in production, you assume full responsibility for any resulting issues.  This endpoint requires the following scopes: `salesPrice:update`.  Update multiple sales prices.
- [🔒 Create sales price V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/postapi-v3-salesprices.md): This endpoint is currently in Beta and available for testing. It may contain bugs, and breaking changes can occur at any time without prior notice. We do not recommend using Beta endpoints in production environments. Should you choose to use it in production, you assume full responsibility for any resulting issues.  This endpoint requires the following scopes: `salesPrice:create`.  Create a new sales price.
- [Create collection](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/analyticscollectioncreate.md): Creates a new collection and returns the new record
- [Delete collection](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/analyticscollectiondelete.md): Deletes an existing collection specified by its ID and returns the deleted record
- [List collections](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/analyticscollectionget.md): Returns a list of report collections (official Xentral collections and custom collections).
- [View collection](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/analyticscollectionlist.md): Returns a single collections by ID.
- [Update collection](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/analyticscollectionupdate.md): Updates an existing collection specified by its ID and returns the new record
- [Get credit information](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/analyticscreditget.md): Get credit information regarding Report module usage.
- [List documentations](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/analyticsdocumentationlist.md): Returns a list of table documentation for each queryable table in the report builder
- [Execute query](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/analyticsquery.md): Execute a query synchronously on the Analytics platform and get result table (Redshift dialect). The number of records that you receive as results is limited to a reasonable amount. This endpoint is mainly for viewing the data. Use the export endpoints in order to fetch all results.
- [Create query export](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/analyticsqueryexportcreate.md): Create a query export. This starts a query execution. The query will be executed asynchronously. You can check the status of the query using the `GET /api/analytics/query/export/{uuid}` endpoint.
- [View query export](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/analyticsqueryexportgetbyid.md): Get specific query export by ID which (if completed successfully) contains a download link to a file in CSV format
- [List query exports](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/analyticsqueryexportlist.md): Get a list of recent query exports and their status. Possible statuses are `success`, `failed`, `running` and `pending`. If status is success, then we also show the download link.
- [Get report usage](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/analyticsreportusageget.md): Get report usage which shows the history of chargeable requests made within the given timeframe
- [Create report](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/analyticsreportcreate.md): Creates a new report and returns the new record
- [Delete report](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/analyticsreportdelete.md): Deletes an existing report specified by its ID and returns the deleted record
- [Create report export](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/analyticsreportexportcreate.md): Create an export for given report based on the SQL statement that is stored with the report. You can overwrite the stored query parameters by passing new parameters in the request body
- [View report export](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/analyticsreportexportgetbyid.md): Get specific report export by ID which (if completed successfully) contains a download link to a file in CSV format
- [List report exports](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/analyticsreportexportlist.md): List all exports for that report. Possible statuses are `success`, `failed`, `running` and `pending`. If status is success, then we also show the download link.
- [View report](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/analyticsreportget.md): Returns a single report by ID
- [List reports](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/analyticsreportlist.md): Returns a list of reports (official Xentral reports and custom reports)
- [Create report permalink](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/analyticsreportpermalinkcreate.md): Create permanent download link for report. You can only have one valid permalink enabled at a time for each report. Creating a new one will invalidate all existing permalinks.
- [Invalidate permalink for report](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/analyticsreportpermalinkdelete.md): Invalidate permanent download link for downloading report results
- [Download report](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/analyticsreportpermalinkdownload.md): Download latest report export result via permalink. Using a permalink will allow anyone with the link to view the report. We recommend to use other export features for exporting data.
- [List report permalink](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/analyticsreportpermalinkget.md): List permanent download link for report. You can only have one valid permalink enabled at a time for each report. Creating a new one will invalidate all existing permalinks.
- [Execute report query](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/analyticsreportquery.md): Execute a stored report query synchronously and get result table. The number of records that you receive as results is limited to a reasonable amount (currently 5000 records). This endpoint is mainly for viewing the data. Use the export endpoints in order to fetch all results.
- [Create report schedule](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/analyticsreportschedulecreate.md): Create scheduled export for report
- [Delete report schedule](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/analyticsreportscheduledelete.md): Delete scheduled report export
- [List report schedules](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/analyticsreportschedulelist.md): List all scheduled report exports
- [Update report schedule](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/analyticsreportscheduleupdate.md): Update scheduled report export
- [Update report](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/analyticsreportupdate.md): Updates an existing report specified by its ID and returns the new record
- [List schedules](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/analyticsschedulelist.md): List all active export schedules for report exports
- [Get settings](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/analyticssettingsget.md): Returns current settings or default settings if none exist
- [Update reporting settings](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/analyticssettingsupdate.md): Updates the current settings
- [Create collective bill](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/collectivebillcreate.md): Creates a collective bill
- [Send credit note](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/creditnotesend.md): Send credit note by email or to a printer. You can also mark the credit note as sent without actually sending it.
- [Log custom credit note activity V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-creditnotes-id-actions-logactivity.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `creditNote:update`.  Record a custom activity log entry for a credit note.
- [Release credit note V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-creditnotes-id-actions-release.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `creditNote:release`.  Release a credit note.
- [Remove credit note write protection V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-creditnotes-id-actions-removewriteprotection.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `creditNote:removeWriteProtection`.  Remove write protection from a credit note.
- [Send credit note V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-creditnotes-id-actions-send.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `creditNote:send`.  Send a credit note.
- [Set credit note write protection V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-creditnotes-id-actions-setwriteprotection.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `creditNote:setWriteProtection`.  Set write protection for a credit note.
- [Delete file from credit note V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/deleteapi-v3-creditnotes-id-files-fileid.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `creditNote:update`.  Delete a file attached to a credit note.
- [Update file on credit note V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-creditnotes-id-files-fileid.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `creditNote:update`.  Update a file attached to a credit note.
- [Attach file to credit note V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/postapi-v3-creditnotes-id-files.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `creditNote:update`.  Attach a file to a credit note.
- [Delete credit note line item V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/deleteapi-v3-creditnotes-id-lineitems-lineitemid.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `creditNote:update`.  Delete a line item from a credit note.
- [View credit note line item V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/getapi-v3-creditnotes-id-lineitems-lineitemid.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `creditNote:read`.  View a single credit note line item.
- [🔒 Update credit note line item V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-creditnotes-id-lineitems-lineitemid.md): This endpoint is currently in Beta and available for testing. It may contain bugs, and breaking changes can occur at any time without prior notice. We do not recommend using Beta endpoints in production environments. Should you choose to use it in production, you assume full responsibility for any resulting issues.  This endpoint requires the following scopes: `creditNote:update`.  Update a line item in a credit note.
- [🔒 Create credit note line item V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/postapi-v3-creditnotes-id-lineitems.md): This endpoint is currently in Beta and available for testing. It may contain bugs, and breaking changes can occur at any time without prior notice. We do not recommend using Beta endpoints in production environments. Should you choose to use it in production, you assume full responsibility for any resulting issues.  This endpoint requires the following scopes: `creditNote:update`.  Create a new credit note line item.
- [View Credit Note Balance](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/creditnotebalance.md): Returns balance information (documents, payments) for a single credit note
- [Create credit note](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/creditnotecreate.md): Creates a credit note<br><br> <h2>Warning: Multiple request body content types</h2> <p>     Due to technical limitations, the information provided here may not display all available request body content types.     We are currently working with our third-party documentation provider to address this issue.     For a complete and accurate representation of the available content types, we recommend referring to the <a target="_blank" href="https://github.com/xentral/api-spec-public">full OpenAPI specification</a>. </p> <p>     We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding as we work to resolve this matter. </p> <h3>Available request content types:</h3> <ul>     <li><b>application/json</b></li> <li>application/vnd.xentral.minimal+json</li> <li>application/vnd.xentral.fromreturn+json</li> </ul>
- [View related documents for credit note](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/creditnotedocumentsview.md): Returns details for related documents of a single credit note.
- [List credit notes](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/creditnotelist.md): Returns a collection with all credit notes.
- [Update credit note](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/creditnoteupdate.md): Update a single credit note
- [View credit note](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/creditnoteview.md): Returns details of a single credit note.
- [Delete credit note V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/deleteapi-v3-creditnotes-id.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `creditNote:delete`.  Delete a credit note in status draft.
- [View credit note V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/getapi-v3-creditnotes-id.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `creditNote:read`.  View a single credit note.  **Content Negotiation:** This endpoint supports additional response formats: `application/pdf`. Use the `Accept` header to request a specific format.
- [List credit notes V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/getapi-v3-creditnotes.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `creditNote:read`.  Paginated list of creditNotes.
- [🔒 Update credit note V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-creditnotes-id.md): This endpoint is currently in Beta and available for testing. It may contain bugs, and breaking changes can occur at any time without prior notice. We do not recommend using Beta endpoints in production environments. Should you choose to use it in production, you assume full responsibility for any resulting issues.  This endpoint requires the following scopes: `creditNote:update`.  Update a credit note.
- [🔒 Create credit note V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/postapi-v3-creditnotes.md): This endpoint is currently in Beta and available for testing. It may contain bugs, and breaking changes can occur at any time without prior notice. We do not recommend using Beta endpoints in production environments. Should you choose to use it in production, you assume full responsibility for any resulting issues.  This endpoint requires the following scopes: `creditNote:create`.  Create a new credit note.
- [Delete delivery note V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/deleteapi-v3-deliverynotes-id.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `deliveryNote:delete`.  Delete a delivery note in status draft.
- [Cancel delivery note V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-deliverynotes-id-actions-cancel.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `deliveryNote:cancel`.  Cancel a delivery note. Restocking the items associated with the delivery note must be handled manually. Delivery notes in status draft or completed cannot be cancelled.
- [Complete delivery note V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-deliverynotes-id-actions-complete.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `deliveryNote:complete`.  Complete a delivery note. Only delivery notes for suppliers and released or sent delivery notes are allowed.
- [Log custom delivery note activity V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-deliverynotes-id-actions-logactivity.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `deliveryNote:update`.  Record a custom activity log entry for a delivery note.
- [Release delivery note V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-deliverynotes-id-actions-release.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `deliveryNote:release`.  Release a delivery note.
- [Remove delivery note write protection V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-deliverynotes-id-actions-removewriteprotection.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `deliveryNote:removeWriteProtection`.  Remove write protection from a delivery note.
- [Send delivery note V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-deliverynotes-id-actions-send.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `deliveryNote:send`.  Send a delivery note.
- [Set delivery note write protection V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-deliverynotes-id-actions-setwriteprotection.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `deliveryNote:setWriteProtection`.  Set write protection for a delivery note.
- [Delete file from delivery note V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/deleteapi-v3-deliverynotes-id-files-fileid.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `deliveryNote:update`.  Delete a file attached to a delivery note.
- [Update file on delivery note V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-deliverynotes-id-files-fileid.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `deliveryNote:update`.  Update a file attached to a delivery note.
- [Attach file to delivery note V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/postapi-v3-deliverynotes-id-files.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `deliveryNote:update`.  Attach a file to a delivery note.
- [Delete delivery note line item V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/deleteapi-v3-deliverynotes-id-lineitems-lineitemid.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `deliveryNote:update`.  Delete a line item of a delivery note.
- [View delivery note line item V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/getapi-v3-deliverynotes-id-lineitems-lineitemid.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `deliveryNote:read`.  View a single delivery note line item.
- [🔒 Update delivery note line item V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-deliverynotes-id-lineitems-lineitemid.md): This endpoint is currently in Beta and available for testing. It may contain bugs, and breaking changes can occur at any time without prior notice. We do not recommend using Beta endpoints in production environments. Should you choose to use it in production, you assume full responsibility for any resulting issues.  This endpoint requires the following scopes: `deliveryNote:update`.  Update a line item in a delivery note.
- [🔒 Create delivery note line item V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/postapi-v3-deliverynotes-id-lineitems.md): This endpoint is currently in Beta and available for testing. It may contain bugs, and breaking changes can occur at any time without prior notice. We do not recommend using Beta endpoints in production environments. Should you choose to use it in production, you assume full responsibility for any resulting issues.  This endpoint requires the following scopes: `deliveryNote:update`.  Create a new delivery note line item.
- [List delivery notes](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/deliverynotelist.md): Returns all delivery notes with pagination and filtering options.
- [Update delivery note positions customs data.](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/deliverynotepositionscustomsupdate.md): Update delivery note positions customs data.   **Attention**: ⚠️   -  This is an interims endpoint that will be _**deprecated and removed**_ in future.   - We will inform all users of this endpoint about the deprecation and removal before.
- [Assign quality control attributes to delivery note](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/deliverynotesassignqualitycontrolattributes.md): Assign quality control attributes to a delivery note.
- [View delivery note shipments](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/deliverynoteshipmentslist.md): Details of delivery note shipments
- [View delivery note](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/deliverynoteview.md): Returns details of a delivery note
- [View delivery note V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/getapi-v3-deliverynotes-id.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `deliveryNote:read`.  View a single delivery note.  **Content Negotiation:** This endpoint supports additional response formats: `application/pdf`. Use the `Accept` header to request a specific format.
- [List delivery notes V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/getapi-v3-deliverynotes.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `deliveryNote:read`.  Paginated list of Delivery Notes.
- [🔒 Update delivery note V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-deliverynotes-id.md): This endpoint is currently in Beta and available for testing. It may contain bugs, and breaking changes can occur at any time without prior notice. We do not recommend using Beta endpoints in production environments. Should you choose to use it in production, you assume full responsibility for any resulting issues.  This endpoint requires the following scopes: `deliveryNote:update`.  Update a delivery note.
- [🔒 Create delivery note V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/postapi-v3-deliverynotes.md): This endpoint is currently in Beta and available for testing. It may contain bugs, and breaking changes can occur at any time without prior notice. We do not recommend using Beta endpoints in production environments. Should you choose to use it in production, you assume full responsibility for any resulting issues.  This endpoint requires the following scopes: `deliveryNote:create`.  Create a new delivery note.
- [List deliveries](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/deliverieslist.md): Lists existing deliveries
- [View delivery](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/deliveryview.md): Returns details of a delivery aka shipment
- [Create tracking information](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/shipmentscreate.md): Creates tracking information
- [View shipment](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/shipmentview.md): Returns details of a shipment aka delivery
- [Delete invoice V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/deleteapi-v3-invoices-id.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `invoice:delete`.  Delete an invoice in status draft.
- [View invoice V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/getapi-v3-invoices-id.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `invoice:read`.  View a single invoice.  **Content Negotiation:** This endpoint supports additional response formats: `application/pdf`. Use the `Accept` header to request a specific format.
- [List invoices V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/getapi-v3-invoices.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `invoice:read`.  Paginated list of invoices.
- [Send invoice V2](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/invoicesendv2.md): Send invoice
- [Log custom invoice activity V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-invoices-id-actions-logactivity.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `invoice:update`.  Record a custom activity log entry for an invoice.
- [Release invoice V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-invoices-id-actions-release.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `invoice:release`.  Release an invoice.
- [Remove invoice write protection V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-invoices-id-actions-removewriteprotection.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `invoice:removeWriteProtection`.  Remove write protection from an invoice.
- [Send invoice V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-invoices-id-actions-send.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `invoice:send`.  Send an invoice.
- [Set invoice write protection V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-invoices-id-actions-setwriteprotection.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `invoice:setWriteProtection`.  Set write protection for an invoice.
- [Delete file from invoice V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/deleteapi-v3-invoices-id-files-fileid.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `invoice:update`.  Delete a file attached to an invoice.
- [Update file on invoice V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-invoices-id-files-fileid.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `invoice:update`.  Update a file attached to an invoice.
- [Attach file to invoice V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/postapi-v3-invoices-id-files.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `invoice:update`.  Attach a file to an invoice.
- [Delete invoice line item V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/deleteapi-v3-invoices-id-lineitems-lineitemid.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `invoice:update`.  Delete a line item from an invoice.
- [View invoice line item V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/getapi-v3-invoices-id-lineitems-lineitemid.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `invoice:read`.  View a single invoice line item.
- [🔒 Update invoice line item V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-invoices-id-lineitems-lineitemid.md): This endpoint is currently in Beta and available for testing. It may contain bugs, and breaking changes can occur at any time without prior notice. We do not recommend using Beta endpoints in production environments. Should you choose to use it in production, you assume full responsibility for any resulting issues.  This endpoint requires the following scopes: `invoice:update`.  Update a line item in an invoice.
- [🔒 Create invoice line item V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/postapi-v3-invoices-id-lineitems.md): This endpoint is currently in Beta and available for testing. It may contain bugs, and breaking changes can occur at any time without prior notice. We do not recommend using Beta endpoints in production environments. Should you choose to use it in production, you assume full responsibility for any resulting issues.  This endpoint requires the following scopes: `invoice:update`.  Create a new invoice line item.
- [View invoice balance](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/invoicebalance.md): Returns balance information (documents, payments) for a single invoice
- [Create invoice](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/invoicecreate.md): Creates a invoice
- [Create positions for invoice](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/invoicecreatepositions.md): Adds invoice positions
- [View related documents for invoice](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/invoicedocumentsview.md): Returns details for related documents of a single invoice.
- [List invoices](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/invoicelist.md): Returns a collection with all invoices.
- [Update status for single invoice](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/invoicestatus.md): Update status for single invoice
- [Update invoice](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/invoiceupdate.md): Update a single invoice
- [View invoice](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/invoiceview.md): Returns details of a single invoice.

It may contain bugs, and breaking changes can occur at any time without prior notice. We do not recommend using Beta endpoints in production environments. - [Release liability](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/liabilityactionsrelease.md): Releases the liability, setting its status to released and enabling write protection
- [Create liability](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/liabilitycreate.md): Creates a single new liability.
- [Create recurring liability](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/liabilitycreaterecurring.md): Creates a single new recurring liability.
- [Add file to liability](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/liabilitydocumentupload.md): Upload a file and adds this file as document to given liability
- [List liabilities](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/liabilitylist.md): Returns a collection with all Liabilities
- [View liability](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/liabilityview.md): Returns details of a single liability.

- [Cancel purchase order V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-purchaseorders-id-actions-cancel.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `purchaseOrder:cancel`.  Cancel a purchase order. Purchase orders in status draft or completed cannot be cancelled.

Complete a purchase order. Purchase orders in status draft, cancelled, or already completed cannot be completed.

- [Create purchase order](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/purchaseordercreate.md): Creates a new purchase order.
- [List purchase orders](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/purchaseorderlist.md): Lists all available purchase orders.
- [Update purchase order](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/purchaseorderupdate.md): Updates an existing purchase order as long as no writing protection is active. When the writing protection is active only isConfirmed, confirmedVia, confirmedDeliveryDate and salesOrderConfirmationReference can be updated.
- [View purchase order](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/purchaseorderview.md): Returns details of a single purchase order
- [Delete return order V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/deleteapi-v3-returnorders-id.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `return:delete`.  Delete a return order in status draft.

View a single return order.  **Content Negotiation:** This endpoint supports additional response formats: `application/pdf`. Use the `Accept` header to request a specific format.
- [List return orders V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/getapi-v3-returnorders.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `return:read`.  Paginated list of return orders.
- [🔒 Update return order V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-returnorders-id.md): This endpoint is currently in Beta and available for testing. It may contain bugs, and breaking changes can occur at any time without prior notice. We do not recommend using Beta endpoints in production environments. Should you choose to use it in production, you assume full responsibility for any resulting issues.  This endpoint requires the following scopes: `return:update`.  Update a return order.
- [🔒 Create return order from delivery note V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/postapi-v3-returnorders-actions-createfromdeliverynote.md): This endpoint is currently in Beta and available for testing. It may contain bugs, and breaking changes can occur at any time without prior notice. We do not recommend using Beta endpoints in production environments. Should you choose to use it in production, you assume full responsibility for any resulting issues.  This endpoint requires the following scopes: `return:create`.  Create a return order from an existing delivery note with selected line items.
- [🔒 Create return order V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/postapi-v3-returnorders.md): This endpoint is currently in Beta and available for testing. It may contain bugs, and breaking changes can occur at any time without prior notice. We do not recommend using Beta endpoints in production environments. Should you choose to use it in production, you assume full responsibility for any resulting issues.  This endpoint requires the following scopes: `return:create`.  Create a new return order.
- [Create return document](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/returncreatedocument.md): Creates new return document
- [Delete multiple return documents](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/returndeletemultiple.md): Deletes a multiple return documents
- [List return documents](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/returnlistdocument.md): Returns a list of given return documents
- [Update multiple return documents](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/returnupdatemultiple.md): Updates multiple return documents
- [View return document](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/returnviewdocument.md): Returns details of a single return document
- [Create return](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/returncreate.md): Creates a new return.
- [List returns](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/returnlist.md): Lists existing returns
- [Cancel return order V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-returnorders-id-actions-cancel.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `return:cancel`.  Cancel a return order. Return orders in status draft or completed cannot be cancelled.
- [Complete return order V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-returnorders-id-actions-complete.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `return:complete`.  Complete a return order. Only return orders for suppliers and released or sent return orders are allowed.
- [Log custom return order activity V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-returnorders-id-actions-logactivity.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `return:update`.  Record a custom activity log entry for a return order.
- [Release return order V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-returnorders-id-actions-release.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `return:release`.  Release a return order.
- [Remove return order write protection V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-returnorders-id-actions-removewriteprotection.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `return:removeWriteProtection`.  Remove write protection from a return order.
- [Send return order V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-returnorders-id-actions-send.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `return:send`.  Send a return order.
- [Set return order write protection V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-returnorders-id-actions-setwriteprotection.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `return:setWriteProtection`.  Set write protection for a return order.
- [Release return](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/returnactionsrelease.md): Releases a return.
- [Delete file from return order V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/deleteapi-v3-returnorders-id-files-fileid.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `return:update`.  Delete a file attached to a return order.
- [Update file on return order V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-returnorders-id-files-fileid.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `return:update`.  Update a file attached to a return order.
- [Attach file to return order V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/postapi-v3-returnorders-id-files.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `return:update`.  Attach a file to a return order.
- [Delete return order line item V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/deleteapi-v3-returnorders-id-lineitems-lineitemid.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `return:update`.  Delete a line item of a return order.
- [View return order line item V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/getapi-v3-returnorders-id-lineitems-lineitemid.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `return:read`.  View a single return order line item.
- [🔒 Update return order line item V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-returnorders-id-lineitems-lineitemid.md): This endpoint is currently in Beta and available for testing. It may contain bugs, and breaking changes can occur at any time without prior notice. We do not recommend using Beta endpoints in production environments. Should you choose to use it in production, you assume full responsibility for any resulting issues.  This endpoint requires the following scopes: `return:update`.  Update a line item in a return order.
- [🔒 Create return order line item V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/postapi-v3-returnorders-id-lineitems.md): This endpoint is currently in Beta and available for testing. It may contain bugs, and breaking changes can occur at any time without prior notice. We do not recommend using Beta endpoints in production environments. Should you choose to use it in production, you assume full responsibility for any resulting issues.  This endpoint requires the following scopes: `return:update`.  Create a new return order line item.
- [List return reasons](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/returnreasonlist.md): Returns a list of return reasons
- [View return](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/returnview.md): Return details of an existing return
- [Delete sales order V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/deleteapi-v3-salesorders-id.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `salesOrder:delete`.  Delete a sales order in status draft.
- [View sales order V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/getapi-v3-salesorders-id.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `salesOrder:read`.  View a single sales order  **Content Negotiation:** This endpoint supports additional response formats: `application/pdf`. Use the `Accept` header to request a specific format.
- [List sales orders V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/getapi-v3-salesorders.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `salesOrder:read`.  Paginated list of Sales Orders
- [🔒 Update sales order V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-salesorders-id.md): This endpoint is currently in Beta and available for testing. It may contain bugs, and breaking changes can occur at any time without prior notice. We do not recommend using Beta endpoints in production environments. Should you choose to use it in production, you assume full responsibility for any resulting issues.  This endpoint requires the following scopes: `salesOrder:update`.  Update a sales order.
- [🔒 Create sales order V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/postapi-v3-salesorders.md): This endpoint is currently in Beta and available for testing. It may contain bugs, and breaking changes can occur at any time without prior notice. We do not recommend using Beta endpoints in production environments. Should you choose to use it in production, you assume full responsibility for any resulting issues.  This endpoint requires the following scopes: `salesOrder:create`.  Create a new sales order.
- [Cancel sales order V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-salesorders-id-actions-cancel.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `salesOrder:cancel`.  Cancel a sales order. Sales orders in status draft or completed cannot be cancelled.
- [Complete sales order V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-salesorders-id-actions-complete.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `salesOrder:complete`.  Complete a sales order. Sales orders in status draft, cancelled or already completed cannot be completed.
- [Log custom sales order activity V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-salesorders-id-actions-logactivity.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `salesOrder:update`.  Record a custom activity log entry for a sales order.
- [Release sales order V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-salesorders-id-actions-release.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `salesOrder:release`.  Release a sales order.
- [Remove sales order write protection V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-salesorders-id-actions-removewriteprotection.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `salesOrder:removeWriteProtection`.  Remove write protection from a sales order.
- [Send sales order V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-salesorders-id-actions-send.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `salesOrder:send`.  Send a sales order.
- [Set sales order write protection V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-salesorders-id-actions-setwriteprotection.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `salesOrder:setWriteProtection`.  Set write protection for a sales order.
- [Cancel sales order](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/salesorderactionscancel.md): Cancels a sales order. Only sales orders in status 'created' or 'completed' can be canceled. For draft sales orders use the delete endpoint.<br><br> <h2>Warning: Multiple request body content types</h2> <p>     Due to technical limitations, the information provided here may not display all available request body content types.     We are currently working with our third-party documentation provider to address this issue.     For a complete and accurate representation of the available content types, we recommend referring to the <a target="_blank" href="https://github.com/xentral/api-spec-public">full OpenAPI specification</a>. </p> <p>     We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding as we work to resolve this matter. </p> <h3>Available request content types:</h3> <ul>     <li><b>application/json</b></li> <li>application/x-www-form-urlencoded</li> </ul>
- [Dispatch sales order](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/salesorderactionsdispatch.md): Dispatch a released sales order, if it fulfills all requirements
- [Create sales order document](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/salesordercreatedocument.md): Creates new sales order document
- [Delete multiple sales order documents](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/salesorderdeletemultiple.md): Deletes a multiple sales order documents
- [List sales order documents](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/salesorderlistdocument.md): Returns a list of given sales order documents
- [Update multiple sales order documents](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/salesorderupdatemultiple.md): Updates multiple sales order documents
- [View sales order document](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/salesorderviewdocument.md): Returns details of a single sales order document
- [Delete file from sales order V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/deleteapi-v3-salesorders-id-files-fileid.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `salesOrder:update`.  Delete a file attached to a sales order.
- [Update file on sales order V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-salesorders-id-files-fileid.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `salesOrder:update`.  Update a file attached to a sales order.
- [Attach file to sales order V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/postapi-v3-salesorders-id-files.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `salesOrder:update`.  Attach a file to a sales order.
- [Delete sales order line item V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/deleteapi-v3-salesorders-id-lineitems-lineitemid.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `salesOrder:update`.  Delete a line item of a sales order.
- [View sales order line item V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/getapi-v3-salesorders-id-lineitems-lineitemid.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `salesOrder:read`.  View a single sales order line item.
- [🔒 Update sales order line item V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-salesorders-id-lineitems-lineitemid.md): This endpoint is currently in Beta and available for testing. It may contain bugs, and breaking changes can occur at any time without prior notice. We do not recommend using Beta endpoints in production environments. Should you choose to use it in production, you assume full responsibility for any resulting issues.  This endpoint requires the following scopes: `salesOrder:update`.  Update a line item in a sales order.
- [🔒 Create sales order line item V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/postapi-v3-salesorders-id-lineitems.md): This endpoint is currently in Beta and available for testing. It may contain bugs, and breaking changes can occur at any time without prior notice. We do not recommend using Beta endpoints in production environments. Should you choose to use it in production, you assume full responsibility for any resulting issues.  This endpoint requires the following scopes: `salesOrder:update`.  Create a new sales order line item.
- [Create partial sales order](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/salesorderactionscreatepartialsalesorder.md): This endpoint creates a partial delivery sales order for an existing sales order. The partial delivery sales order will be copied from the existing sales order without any positions and gets linked as partial delivery sales order. Adding positions to the partial delivery sales order needs to be done by using the Update existing sales order endpoint. Please pay attention to remove the positions in the original sales order or to adjust the quantities if you do not fully transfer the whole position to the partial delivery sales order.
- [Delete sales order](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/salesorderdelete.md): Deletes a sales order in draft status
- [Import sales order](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/salesorderimport.md): Import a sales order from external marketplace
- [List sales orders](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/salesorderlist.md): Returns a collection with all sales orders.
- [Update sales order](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/salesorderupdate.md): <strong>CAUTION: Positions not specified in the payload will be DELETED. Please pass the ids along if you need them to be preserved.</strong><br><br>The sales order edit endpoint allows for updating an existing sales order. When updating, any positions not included in the positions payload will be implicitly deleted from the order. This ensures that the positions list in the payload accurately reflects the desired state of the sales order after the update.
- [View sales order](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/salesorderview.md): Returns details of a sales order
- [Delete file from service order V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/deleteapi-v3-serviceorders-id-files-fileid.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `serviceOrder:update`.  Delete a file attached to a service order.
- [Update file on service order V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-serviceorders-id-files-fileid.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `serviceOrder:update`.  Update a file attached to a service order.
- [Attach file to service order V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/postapi-v3-serviceorders-id-files.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `serviceOrder:update`.  Attach a file to a service order.
- [Delete file from supplier invoice V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/deleteapi-v3-supplierinvoices-id-files-fileid.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `supplierInvoice:update`.  Delete a file attached to a supplier invoice.
- [Update file on supplier invoice V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-supplierinvoices-id-files-fileid.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `supplierInvoice:update`.  Update a file attached to a supplier invoice.
- [Attach file to supplier invoice V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/postapi-v3-supplierinvoices-id-files.md): This endpoint requires the following scopes: `supplierInvoice:update`.  Attach a file to a supplier invoice.

- [List payment methods](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/paymentmethodlist.md): Lists all payment methods.
- [Create payment service provider transactions](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/paymentserviceprovidertransactioncreatev1.md): Creates one or more transactions for a specific payment service provider.
- [List payment service provider transactions](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/paymentserviceprovidertransactionlistv1.md): Returns a collection of transactions for a specific payment service provider.
- [Create payment terms group](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/paymenttermsgroupcreate.md): This endpoint is only available as early access version and will introduce breaking changes without further notice or versioning.  PaymentTermsGroups can be used to group customers with identical payment terms such as different discounts, payment targets, and free postage options. For more details about the group feature have a look at our <a href="https://help.xentral.com/hc/en-us/articles/360016722000-Groups">handbook article</a>.
- [List payment terms groups](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/paymenttermsgrouplist.md): This endpoint is only available as early access version and will introduce breaking changes without further notice or versioning.  PaymentTermsGroups can be used to group customers with identical payment terms such as different discounts, payment targets, and free postage options. For more details about the group feature have a look at our <a href="https://help.xentral.com/hc/en-us/articles/360016722000-Groups">handbook article</a>.
- [View payment terms group](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/paymenttermsgroupview.md): This endpoint is only available as early access version and will introduce breaking changes without further notice or versioning.  PaymentTermsGroups can be used to group customers with identical payment terms such as different discounts, payment targets, and free postage options. For more details about the group feature have a look at our <a href="https://help.xentral.com/hc/en-us/articles/360016722000-Groups">handbook article</a>.
- [Update payment transaction status](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/paymenttransactionstatus.md): Update status for single Payment Transaction
- [View payment transaction](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/paymenttransactionview.md): Returns details of a single payment transaction
- [🔒 Create revenue account mapping](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/revenueaccountmappingcreatev1.md): This endpoint is currently in Beta and available for testing. - [🔒 Create tax obligation](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/taxobligationcreatev1.md): This endpoint is currently in Beta and available for testing. It may contain bugs, and breaking changes can occur at any time without prior notice. We do not recommend using Beta endpoints in production environments. Should you choose to use it in production, you assume full responsibility for any resulting issues.  Creates a single tax obligation.
- [🔒 List Tax Obligation Entries](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/taxobligationlistv1.md): This endpoint is currently in Beta and available for testing. It may contain bugs, and breaking changes can occur at any time without prior notice. We do not recommend using Beta endpoints in production environments. Should you choose to use it in production, you assume full responsibility for any resulting issues.  Retrieves a list of tax obligations entries.
- [List tax rates](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/taxratelist.md): This endpoint returns the tax rate for a given country code. The country code is a two-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code. The response is a list of applicable tax rates for the given country code. To get a more granular response you can use the query parameters to filter the response, for example by product or project.  The applicable tax rate is determined in the following order: 1. If a custom tax rate is defined for the product, it is returned. 2. If a tax rate is defined in the taxRates module for that country, it is returned. 3. If a tax rate is defined in the taxRates module for the project, or a generic tax Rate without country or project it is returned. 4. If a tax rate is defined for the applicable project it is returned. 5. If a tax rate is defined for the system it is returned. 6. If no tax rate is defined anywhere we will return an empty list.  To see which step was used to determine the tax rate, the source field is returned in the response.
- [🔒 List Tax Type Mapping Entries with Extended Detail](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/taxtypemappingextendeddetaillistv1.md): This endpoint is currently in Beta and available for testing. It may contain bugs, and breaking changes can occur at any time without prior notice. We do not recommend using Beta endpoints in production environments. Should you choose to use it in production, you assume full responsibility for any resulting issues.  Retrieves a list of tax type mapping entries with preloaded related objects.
- [🔒 Get Tax Type Mapping Entry with Extended Detail by ID](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/taxtypemappingextendeddetailviewv1.md): This endpoint is currently in Beta and available for testing. It may contain bugs, and breaking changes can occur at any time without prior notice. We do not recommend using Beta endpoints in production environments. Should you choose to use it in production, you assume full responsibility for any resulting issues.  Retrieves a specific tax type mapping entry by its ID with preloaded related objects.
- [🔒 Create tax type](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/taxtypecreatev1.md): This endpoint is currently in Beta and available for testing. It may contain bugs, and breaking changes can occur at any time without prior notice. We do not recommend using Beta endpoints in production environments. Should you choose to use it in production, you assume full responsibility for any resulting issues.  Creates a single tax type.
- [🔒 Delete Tax Type Entry by ID](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/taxtypedeletev1.md): This endpoint is currently in Beta and available for testing. It may contain bugs, and breaking changes can occur at any time without prior notice. We do not recommend using Beta endpoints in production environments. Should you choose to use it in production, you assume full responsibility for any resulting issues.  Deletes a specific tax type entry by its ID.
- [🔒 Get Tax Type Entry by ID](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/taxtypegetv1.md): This endpoint is currently in Beta and available for testing. It may contain bugs, and breaking changes can occur at any time without prior notice. We do not recommend using Beta endpoints in production environments. Should you choose to use it in production, you assume full responsibility for any resulting issues.  Retrieves a specific tax type entry by its ID.

- [Release production](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/productionactionsrelease.md): Releases the production

- [List storage items V2](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/storagelocationlistv2.md): Returns all storage location items for the specified warehouse / location.
- [Retrieve item from storage location](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/warehouseretrieveitem.md): Retrieves certain units of stock for a given item from a specific Storage Location.
- [Add item to storage location](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/warehousestockitem.md): Adds stock for a given item to a specific Storage Location.
- [Create storage location](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/storagelocationcreate.md): Creates a new storage location
- [Delete storage location](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/storagelocationdelete.md): Delete a storage location for the specified warehouse.
- [List storage locations](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/storagelocationlist.md): This endpoint is only available as beta version and will introduce breaking changes without further notice or versioning. Returns all storage locations for the specified warehouse.
- [Set total stock on storage locations](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/storagelocationssettotalstock.md): This endpoint sets the total stock for one or more storage locations.<br>The stock data provided in the payload, including quality control attributes (batch, best-before date, and serial number), will be taken over as the new stock for the specified storage location(s).<br><br><strong>CAUTION: Any stock that was previously present in the storage location and is not specified in the payload will be removed from the storage location. This also includes the quality control attributes.</strong>
- [Update storage location](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/storagelocationupdate.md): Update a storage location for the specified warehouse.

- [Delete product](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/productdelete.md): Deletes a single product<br><br> <h2>Warning: Multiple request body content types</h2> <p>     Due to technical limitations, the information provided here may not display all available request body content types.     We are currently working with our third-party documentation provider to address this issue.     For a complete and accurate representation of the available content types, we recommend referring to the <a target="_blank" href="https://github.com/xentral/api-spec-public">full OpenAPI specification</a>. </p> <p>     We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding as we work to resolve this matter. </p> <h3>Available request content types:</h3> <ul>     <li><b>*/*</b></li> <li>application/vnd.xentral.force</li> </ul>
- [Delete multiple products](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/productdeletemultiple.md): Deletes multiple products<br><br> <h2>Warning: Multiple request body content types</h2> <p>     Due to technical limitations, the information provided here may not display all available request body content types.     We are currently working with our third-party documentation provider to address this issue.     For a complete and accurate representation of the available content types, we recommend referring to the <a target="_blank" href="https://github.com/xentral/api-spec-public">full OpenAPI specification</a>. </p> <p>     We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding as we work to resolve this matter. </p> <h3>Available request content types:</h3> <ul>     <li><b>application/json</b></li> <li>application/vnd.xentral.force+json</li> </ul>

Should you choose to use it in production, you assume full responsibility for any resulting issues.  This endpoint requires the following scopes: `customer:update`.  Create a new delivery address for a customer.
- [Create customer](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/customercreatev2.md): Creates a new customer.
- [Delete customer](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/customerdelete.md): Delete existing customer
- [List customers](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/customerlistv2.md): Fetches a list of customers based on provided filters and pagination parameters. This endpoint supports filtering by various customer attributes, as well as cursor and page-based pagination for efficient data retrieval.
- [Update customer](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/customerupdatev2.md): Update an existing customer.
- [View customer](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/customerviewv2.md): Returns details of a single customer
- [🔒 Delete customer V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/deleteapi-v3-customers-id.md): This endpoint is currently in Beta and available for testing. It may contain bugs, and breaking changes can occur at any time without prior notice. We do not recommend using Beta endpoints in production environments. Should you choose to use it in production, you assume full responsibility for any resulting issues.  This endpoint requires the following scopes: `customer:delete`.  Delete a customer. This performs a soft delete on the customer and all associated delivery addresses and contact persons.
- [🔒 View customer V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/getapi-v3-customers-id.md): This endpoint is currently in Beta and available for testing. It may contain bugs, and breaking changes can occur at any time without prior notice. We do not recommend using Beta endpoints in production environments. Should you choose to use it in production, you assume full responsibility for any resulting issues.  This endpoint requires the following scopes: `customer:read`.  View a single customer.
- [🔒 List customers V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/getapi-v3-customers.md): This endpoint is currently in Beta and available for testing. It may contain bugs, and breaking changes can occur at any time without prior notice. We do not recommend using Beta endpoints in production environments. Should you choose to use it in production, you assume full responsibility for any resulting issues.  This endpoint requires the following scopes: `customer:read`.  Paginated list of customers.
- [🔒 Update customer V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/patchapi-v3-customers-id.md): This endpoint is currently in Beta and available for testing. It may contain bugs, and breaking changes can occur at any time without prior notice. We do not recommend using Beta endpoints in production environments. Should you choose to use it in production, you assume full responsibility for any resulting issues.  This endpoint requires the following scopes: `customer:update`.  Update an existing customer.
- [🔒 Create customer V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/postapi-v3-customers.md): This endpoint is currently in Beta and available for testing. It may contain bugs, and breaking changes can occur at any time without prior notice. We do not recommend using Beta endpoints in production environments. Should you choose to use it in production, you assume full responsibility for any resulting issues.  This endpoint requires the following scopes: `customer:create`.  Create a new customer.
- [List employees](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/employeelist.md): Lists existing employees
- [🔒 Delete contact person V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/deleteapi-v3-suppliers-supplierid-contactpersons-contactpersonid.md): This endpoint is currently in Beta and available for testing. It may contain bugs, and breaking changes can occur at any time without prior notice. We do not recommend using Beta endpoints in production environments. Should you choose to use it in production, you assume full responsibility for any resulting issues.  This endpoint requires the following scopes: `supplier:update`.  Delete a contact person for a supplier.
- [🔒 View contact person V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/getapi-v3-suppliers-supplierid-contactpersons-contactpersonid.md): This endpoint is currently in Beta and available for testing. - [🔒 List contact persons V3](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/getapi-v3-suppliers-supplierid-contactpersons.md): This endpoint is currently in Beta and available for testing. It may contain bugs, and breaking changes can occur at any time without prior notice. We do not recommend using Beta endpoints in production environments. - [Delete supplier](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/supplierdelete.md): Delete existing supplier
- [List suppliers](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/supplierlist.md): Lists existing suppliers
- [View supplier](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/supplierview.md): Shows an existing supplier details
- [Create address free field](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/settingsmasterdataaddresscustomfieldscreatev1.md): Creates a address custom field configuration.
- [List address free fields](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/settingsmasterdataaddresscustomfieldslistv2.md): Fetches all configured address custom fields. Pagination is not necessary because of limit of such fields (20).
- [Exchange subject token for platform access token](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/auth-platformexchangetoken.md): Request body for token exchange
- [List files for a document](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/fileslist.md): Returns a collection with all files for a document.
- [View file of a document by id](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/filesview.md): Returns details of a single file. If you want to access the file itself please use accept-header `application/vnd.xentral.file`.
- [Create print job](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/printjobscreate.md): Create a new print job.
- [List projects](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/projectlist.md): Returns a collection of projects
- [List POS settings for project](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/projectpossettings.md): Returns a list of POS settings of a project
- [List sales channels V2](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/saleschannellistv2.md): Returns a collection with all sales channels.
- [Assign tags to multiple resources](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/tagbulkassign.md): Bulk assigns tags to multiple resources
- [Remove tags from multiple resources](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/tagbulkremove.md): Bulk removes tags from multiple resources
- [Create a new tag](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/tagcreateaction.md): Creates a new tag.
- [Delete tags](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/tagdeletemultiple.md): Deletes tags
- [List tags](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/taglist.md): Lists all tags
- [Update multiple tags](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/tagupdatemultiple.md): Update multiple tags
- [List text templates](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/settingstext-templatesv2.md): Show all receipt related text template settings
- [Update text templates](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/settingstext-templatesv2update.md): Update one or more text template settings
- [Download user permissions](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/useractionsdownloadpermissions.md): Returns user permissions in a downloadable format with German field names preserved.
- [Create user](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/usercreate.md): Creates a new user using one of the available operations
- [Delete user](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/userdelete.md): Deletes a single user resource identified by its URI
- [List users V2](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/userlistv2.md): Returns a collection with all users.
- [List user permissions](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/userpermissionview.md): Returns all permissions of an user.
- [Request reset password email](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/userreset-password.md): Request reset password email
- [Update user](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/userupdate.md): Update a set of changes of an user.<br><br> <h2>Warning: Multiple request body content types</h2> <p>     Due to technical limitations, the information provided here may not display all available request body content types.     We are currently working with our third-party documentation provider to address this issue.     For a complete and accurate representation of the available content types, we recommend referring to the <a target="_blank" href="https://github.com/xentral/api-spec-public">full OpenAPI specification</a>. </p> <p>     We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding as we work to resolve this matter. </p> <h3>Available request content types:</h3> <ul>     <li><b>application/json</b></li> <li>application/vnd.xentral.password+json</li> <li>application/vnd.xentral.mfa+json</li> </ul>
- [View user](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/userview.md): Returns details of a single user
- [Create webhook](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/webhookcreate.md): Creates a new webhook.
- [Delete webhook](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/webhookdelete.md): Delete a webhook
- [List webhook event types](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/webhookeventtypeslist.md): List webhooks event types.
- [List webhooks](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/webhooklist.md): List webhooks.
- [Update webhook](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/webhookupdate.md): Update a webhook.
- [View webhook](https://developer.xentral.com/reference/webhookview.md): View a webhook.
